mapper.insert: insert into student (name, no, gender, phone, id_card, is_college, address, degree, graduation_date, clazz_id, violation_count, violation_score, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{no}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{isCollege}, #{address}, #{degree}, #{graduationDate}, #{clazzId}, #{violationCount}, #{violationScore}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update student set violation_count = COALESCE(violation_count, 0) + 1, violation_score = COALESCE(violation_score, 0) + #{scoreValue}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select s.*, c.name as clazzName from student s left join clazz c on s.clazz_id = c.id where s.id = #{id}
